agency.name: Maryland Department of Veterans and Military Families

programs.name: Disabled Veterans Property Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Full exemption from real property taxes on the dwelling house of veterans with a 100% permanent and total service-connected disability, with no home-value cap and eligibility extended to unremarried surviving spouses.

programs.name: Edward T. and Mary A. Conroy Memorial Scholarship
programs.blurb: State scholarship for eligible Maryland veterans with a service-connected disability of 25% or greater (and certain family members) attending Maryland institutions after exhausting federal education benefits.

programs.name: Military Retirement Pay Income Tax Subtraction
programs.blurb: Maryland allows retirees to subtract a portion of military retirement income from state taxable income, with a larger subtraction for taxpayers age 55 and older.

programs.name: Charlotte Hall Veterans Home
programs.blurb: State-run assisted living, skilled nursing, and memory care home in St. Mary's County for honorably discharged Maryland veterans and certain eligible spouses.

programs.name: Complimentary and Discounted Hunting & Fishing Licenses
programs.blurb: Maryland DNR offers a complimentary lifetime hunting/fishing license to 100% service-connected disabled veteran residents and former POWs, plus discounted licenses for Purple Heart recipients.

agency.name: Massachusetts Executive Office of Veterans Services

programs.name: Chapter 115 Veterans' Financial Benefits
programs.blurb: Means-tested financial safety net under M.G.L. Chapter 115 providing eligible low-income veterans and dependents assistance with living expenses and medical care through local Veterans Service Officers.

programs.name: Local Property Tax Exemptions for Veterans
programs.blurb: Clause 22 local property tax exemptions for veterans with VA disability ratings of at least 10%, Purple Heart recipients, certain surviving spouses, and fully exempt categories for the most severely disabled.

programs.name: Welcome Home Veterans' Bonus
programs.blurb: One-time state bonus payment for Massachusetts residents who served on active duty after September 11, 2001, administered by the Veterans' Bonus Division.

programs.name: Veterans Tuition Waiver
programs.blurb: Full or partial tuition waiver for eligible Massachusetts veterans at state public colleges and universities on a space-available basis.

programs.name: Veterans Homes at Chelsea and Holyoke
programs.blurb: Two state-run veterans homes providing long-term care and residential services to eligible Massachusetts veterans, including a new state-of-the-art facility in Chelsea.

programs.name: Disabled Veterans Property Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Full property tax exemption on the homestead of Michigan veterans rated 100% permanently and totally disabled, rated individually unemployable, or who received VA specially adapted housing assistance, including unremarried surviving spouses.

programs.name: Michigan Veterans Trust Fund Emergency Assistance
programs.blurb: Emergency grants for Michigan veterans and their families facing short-term financial crises, administered through county committees.

programs.name: Children of Veterans Tuition Grant
programs.blurb: Undergraduate tuition assistance for children of Michigan veterans who died or became totally and permanently disabled from a service-connected condition or are missing in action.

programs.name: Michigan Veteran Homes
programs.blurb: Three state-run long-term care homes (Grand Rapids, Chesterfield Township, and D.J. Jacobetti in Marquette) providing skilled nursing, rehabilitation, and memory care for eligible veterans.

programs.name: Free Hunting & Fishing Licenses and State Park Access for Disabled Veterans
programs.blurb: Michigan resident veterans rated 100% disabled or individually unemployable receive free non-lottery hunting and fishing licenses and free entry to state parks.

programs.name: Military Retirement Pay Income Tax Exemption
programs.blurb: Military retirement pay and active-duty military pay are exempt from Michigan individual income tax.
